heading: Parameters
body:
| Parameter   | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Required? |
| ----------- | ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| createStore | string | Name of the new federated database instance store. The federated database instance store name must be unique.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | yes       |
| provider    | string | Name of the service where the data is stored. Value can be one of the following:s3 for an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket.azure for Azure Blob Storage container.atlas for Atlas cluster.http for files hosted at publicly accessible URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s.dls:\<subtype> for online archives. Atlas Data Federation supports the following subtypes:aws - for data stored on AWS (Amazon Web Services). Value must be dls:aws.azure - for data stored on Azure (Microsoft Azure). Value must be dls:azure. | yes       |

| region                   | string           | Region in which the bucket is hosted. For a list of valid region names, see Amazon Web Services (AWS).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | yes |
| ------------------------ | ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --- |
| bucket                   | string           | Name of the bucket in which data is stored. Must exactly match the name of an S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket that Data Federation can access using AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) credentials.                                                                                                                                                                                      | yes |
| additionalStorageClasses | array of strings | Array of AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) storage classes. Atlas Data Federation will include the files in these storage classes in the query results. Valid values are:INTELLIGENT\_TIERING to include files in the Intelligent Tiering storage class.STANDARD\_IA to include files in the Standard-Infrequent Access storage class.Files in the Standard storage class are supported by default. | no  |
| delimiter                | string           | Character used to separate path segments in the federated database instance store. If ommitted, defaults to "/".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | no  |
| public                   | boolean          | Flag that indicates whether or not the bucket is public. Valid values are:true to not use the AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) role to access the bucketfalse to require the AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) role to access the bucketIf omitted, defaults to false.                                                                                       | no  |
